Question:
What is the smallest carbonate weathering flux (in PJ) for locations that host a Type II low‑activity methanotrophic community (alphaproteobacterial dominant) and that have microfragment hotspots concentrated near agricultural run‑off?

Restrict the calculation to:

1) episodic debris‑dominated bolus delivery after wildfire with moderately shallow rooting (median near 30 centimetres)
2) supply‑limited seasonal pulses dominated by bank collapse with intermediate rooting (median ~50 centimetres) and mild albedo anisotropy with detectable forward scattering at low solar zeniths
3) very deep rooting (median exceeding the typical fine‑root zone) with backscatter‑dominant anisotropy associated with rough microfacets
4) transport‑limited chronic fines export from cultivated hillslopes with deep rooting (median approaching 80 centimetres in xeric patches) and pronounced forward‑scattering anisotropy from specular surfaces
SQL Query: ['SELECT TopographicConvergenceIndex FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE MethanotrophicActivityClass = "Type II low-activity community (alphaproteobacterial dominant)" AND AnthropogenicDebrisLoadClass = "microfragment hotspots concentrated near agricultural run-off zones";', 'SELECT PaludificationStage FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE', 'SELECT BiogenicVOCEmissionsPotential FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE', 'SELECT SoilPoreConnectivityClass FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE', 'SELECT MIN(CarbonateWeatheringFlux) AS CarbonateWeatheringFlux FROM (SELECT CarbonateWeatheringFlux AS CarbonateWeatheringFlux FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE SedimentDeliveryRegime = "episodic debris-dominated bolus delivery after wildfire" AND RootingDepthMedian = "moderately shallow rooting with median near 30 centimetres"" UNION ALL SELECT CarbonateWeatheringFlux AS CarbonateWeatheringFlux FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE SedimentDeliveryRegime = "supply-limited seasonal pulses dominated by bank collapse" AND RootingDepthMedian = "intermediate rooting distribution median ~50 centimetres" AND AlbedoAnisotropyBand = "mild anisotropy with detectable forward scattering at low solar zeniths" UNION ALL SELECT CarbonateWeatheringFlux AS CarbonateWeatheringFlux FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE RootingDepthMedian = "very deep rooting median exceeding typical fine-root zone" AND AlbedoAnisotropyBand = "backscatter-dominant anisotropy associated with rough microfacets"" UNION ALL SELECT CarbonateWeatheringFlux AS CarbonateWeatheringFlux FROM CatchmentProcessCatalogue WHERE SedimentDeliveryRegime = "transport-limited chronic fines export from cultivated hillslopes" AND RootingDepthMedian = "deep rooting median approaching 80 centimetres in xeric patches" AND AlbedoAnisotropyBand = "pronounced forward-scattering anisotropy from specular surfaces"");']
